text: Since Marc Andreessen infamous commentary we have seen a continued growth in software vs. hardware infrastructure buoyed by the need to deliver a full infrastructure stack that integrates compute, virtualisation, storage, networking and security to power any application, at any scale. Moreover agility and simplicity of transitioning to public cloud offers great benefits but requires harmonisation of IT operations to bring frictionless mobility to all applications. In short, software is the heart of technology and our approach epitomises this with our engagement process.
